task_completion.description: Verify the admin profile is updated with the correct name, bio, timezone, and phone number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The profile settings page shows First Name 'Marcus', Last Name 'Whitfield', Phone containing '7035558294', Timezone 'America/New_York', and the bio containing 'Crestview Realty Partners' and 'Eastern Seaboard'.

task_completion.description: Verify the five specified Crestview teams have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A team management or workspace list in Socioboard displays 'Crestview - Manhattan Office', 'Crestview - Brooklyn Office', 'Crestview - Boston Office', 'Crestview - Philadelphia Office', and 'Crestview - National Brand'.

task_completion.description: Verify John Smith is assigned to the correct teams.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Team member lists or user management screens show 'john.smith@socioboard.local' as a member of 'Crestview - Manhattan Office' and 'Crestview - National Brand'.

task_completion.description: Verify the BBC Business RSS feed is integrated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The RSS feeds or content monitoring section in Socioboard shows the URL 'https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/business/rss.xml' added.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with Socioboard.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Socioboard interface.

integrity.description: Ensure no terminal windows with curl or database commands are used to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing direct database manipulation or API requests to Socioboard.

integrity.description: The screenshots must show the Socioboard interface, not a text document or mock-up.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Socioboard application UI is visible, rather than a text editor or notes app containing the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Profile details: First Name: Marcus, Last Name: Whitfield, Bio contains 'Crestview Realty Partners' and 'Eastern Seaboard', Timezone: America/New_York, Phone: 7035558294. Teams to create: Crestview - Manhattan Office, Crestview - Brooklyn Office, Crestview - Boston Office, Crestview - Philadelphia Office, Crestview - National Brand. John Smith (john.smith@socioboard.local) must be in Manhattan Office and National Brand teams, but NOT in Brooklyn, Boston, or Philadelphia. RSS Feed URL: https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/business/rss.xml
